span_mappings.nl_span: Addition of natural numbers satisfies left commutativity: a + (b + c) = b + (a + c)

formal_statement: theorem qa_mathlib18_nat_add_left_comm (a b c : ℕ) : a + (b + c) = b + (a + c)
natural_language_claim: Addition of natural numbers satisfies left commutativity: a + (b + c) = b + (a + c).
